Bash(python -c "
import pandas as pd

# 读取表
shop = pd.read_excel\(''shop.xlsx'', skiprows=2\)
item = pd.read_excel\(''item.xlsx'', skiprows=2\)

# 创建 item id -> name 映射
item_map = dict\(zip\(item[''id''].astype\(str\), item[''name'']\)\)

# 检查 shop 表中需要更新的
results = []
for idx, row in shop.iterrows\(\):
    item_col = str\(row[''item'']\)
    item_name = str\(row[''itemName'']\)
    
    # 提取 itemId \(格式: itemId|count\)
    if ''|'' in item_col:
        item_id = item_col.split\(''|''\)[0]
    else:
        item_id = item_col
    
    # 查找 item 表中的名字
    if item_id in item_map:
        real_name = item_map[item_id]
        # 检查是否需要更新（名字不匹配）
        # 去掉数量后缀比较
        base_name = item_name.split\(''*''\)[0]
        if base_name != real_name and real_name not in item_name:
            results.append\(f''{row[""id""]}|{item_col}|{item_name}|{real_name}''\)

print\(''shop_id|item|当前itemName|item表name''\)
for r in results:
    print\(r\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import pandas as pd

shop = pd.read_excel\(''shop.xlsx'', skiprows=2\)
item = pd.read_excel\(''item.xlsx'', skiprows=2\)

item_map = dict\(zip\(item[''id''].astype\(str\), item[''name'']\)\)

results = []
for idx, row in shop.iterrows\(\):
    item_col = str\(row[''item'']\)
    item_name = str\(row[''itemName'']\)
    
    if ''|'' in item_col:
        item_id = item_col.split\(''|''\)[0]
    else:
        item_id = item_col
    
    if item_id in item_map:
        real_name = item_map[item_id]
        base_name = item_name.split\(''*''\)[0]
        if base_name != real_name and real_name not in item_name:
            results.append\(f''{row[""id""]}|{item_col}|{item_name}|{real_name}''\)

print\(''shop_id|item|当前itemName|item表name''\)
for r in results:
    print\(r\)
")

import openpyxl

# 读取签到配置
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''d:/furry/banhao/zuiqianglingzhu/client/ZuiQiangLingZhu/Luban/Config/Datas/qianDao.xlsx''\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    print\(f''=== Sheet: {sheet_name} ===''\)

    print\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl

# 读取物品配置
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''d:/furry/banhao/zuiqianglingzhu/client/ZuiQiangLingZhu/Luban/Config/Datas/item.xlsx''\)
item_ids = set\(\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
        if i >= 3 and row[1]:  # 跳过表头，获取id列
            try:
                item_ids.add\(int\(row[1]\)\)
            except:
                pass

print\(''物品表中的所有ID:''\)
for item_id in sorted\(item_ids\):
    print\(item_id\)
print\(f''\\n总共 {len\(item_ids\)} 个物品''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl

# 查看签到表中无效物品的完整奖励配置
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''d:/furry/banhao/zuiqianglingzhu/client/ZuiQiangLingZhu/Luban/Config/Datas/qianDao.xlsx''\)
ws = wb[''Sheet1'']

print\(''包含无效物品ID的签到配置:''\)
print\(''=''*80\)
invalid_ids = [61001, 81001, 82001]
for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
    if i >= 3 and row[4]:
        award_str = str\(row[4]\)
        for inv_id in invalid_ids:
            if str\(inv_id\) in award_str:
                print\(f''行{i+1}: ID={row[1]}, 天数={row[2]}, 类型={row[3]}, 奖励={row[4]}''\)
                break
")

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl

# 读取 item.xlsx
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''d:/furry/banhao/zuiqianglingzhu/client/ZuiQiangLingZhu/Luban/Config/Datas/item.xlsx''\)
print\(''=== Item 表 ===''\)
ws = wb.active
for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
    if i < 10:
        print\(f''{i}: {row}''\)
print\(''...''\)

# 获取所有 item id
item_ids = set\(\)
for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
    if i >= 3 and row[1]:  # 跳过表头，获取 id 列
        try:
            item_ids.add\(int\(row[1]\)\)
        except:
            pass

print\(f''\\nItem 表共有 {len\(item_ids\)} 个物品''\)
print\(f''部分 ID: {sorted\(list\(item_ids\)\)[:50]}''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl

# 读取 item.xlsx 获取所有有效 item ID
wb_item = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''d:/furry/banhao/zuiqianglingzhu/client/ZuiQiangLingZhu/Luban/Config/Datas/item.xlsx''\)
ws_item = wb_item.active
item_ids = set\(\)
for i, row in enumerate\(ws_item.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
    if i >= 3 and row[1]:
        try:
            item_ids.add\(int\(row[1]\)\)
        except:
            pass

print\(f''Item 表共有 {len\(item_ids\)} 个物品''\)
print\(f''ID 范围示例: {sorted\(list\(item_ids\)\)[:20]}''\)
print\(f''最小ID: {min\(item_ids\)}, 最大ID: {max\(item_ids\)}''\)
")
